about.heading: About Me
about.paragraph1: I am a student practitioner specializing in project operations and execution. Across my student leadership and project experiences, I have consistently applied structured thinking to drive action — from goal decomposition and process design to resource integration and on-the-ground execution.
about.paragraph2: I believe great operations is not just about 'getting things done' — it is about building reusable systems and standards (SOPs) that enable teams to collaborate efficiently within a clear framework. Whether managing a large student organization or building a society's brand identity from scratch, I am driven by turning chaos into order and ideas into outcomes.
about.paragraph3: My core strengths lie in project planning and coordination, cross-functional communication, and maintaining execution discipline under high-pressure, multi-threaded environments. I thrive on the 0-to-1 journey and take pleasure in finding optimal solutions within complex systems.

experience.heading: Experience
experience.subheading: Every role is a project in its own right
